ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data (if applicable) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the states table */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the cities table */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the area */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of reported crimes */,
  "violent_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of violent crimes */,
  "property_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of property crimes */,
  "murder" INTEGER /* Number of murder cases */,
  "forcible_rape" INTEGER /* Number of forcible rape cases */,
  "robbery" INTEGER /* Number of robbery cases */,
  "aggravated_assault" INTEGER /* Number of aggravated assault cases */,
  "burglary" INTEGER /* Number of burglary cases */,
  "larceny_theft" INTEGER /* Number of larceny theft cases */,
  "vehicle_theft" INTEGER /* Number of vehicle theft cases */,
  "arrests" INTEGER /* Number of arrests made */,
  "convictions" INTEGER /* Number of convictions */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the demographics table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the cities table (capital city of the state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the states table */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic record */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the crime type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Main category of the crime */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_actions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the law enforcement action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., arrest, conviction) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of actions taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

Foreign key to the cities table
Foreign key to the demographics table
